title: US-UK transatlantic taskforce unveils digital asset roadmap promoting stablecoin innovation
message_html: US-UK transatlantic taskforce unveils digital asset roadmap promoting stablecoin innovation ...
snippet: The U.S. and UK are deepening cooperation on digital assets, particularly for stablecoins and tokenized assets.

title: Wall Street turns cautious on Circle as analysts warn USDC economics face mounting pressure
message_html: Wall Street turns cautious on Circle as analysts warn USDC economics face mounting pressure ...
snippet: Mizuho downgraded the stock and JPMorgan lowered earnings estimates, citing concerns that USDC is coming under pressure.
